evals.prompt: Audit CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md in this repo and propose a compact rewrite plan without editing files.
evals.expected_output: Reports line counts, bloat causes, stale/duplicate sections, and a section-by-section rewrite plan.

evals.prompt: Clean a bloated AGENTS.md that contains a full bd command reference, docker command cookbook, SQL examples, and stale project name.
evals.expected_output: Replaces manuals with skill/--help pointers, preserves current project map/gotchas, and flags stale names.

evals.prompt: Create a new CLAUDE.md for a repo with service skills and GitNexus enabled.
evals.expected_output: Uses the compact template, includes GitNexus safety notes, and routes service/project context through /scope or using-service-skills.
